text: {"text": "Don't say, how are you? Say, what's good? Don't say, I'm doing well. Say, chilling. Don't say, good job. Say, kudos. Don't say, I forgot it. Say, it slipped my mind. Don't say, I have to go. Say, got to go. Don't say, no problem. Say, no biggie. The biggest lie about learning English, that you need more vocabulary. You don't. You need to start speaking. Stacy, what advice would you give to a beginner who wants to improve their English quickly? Just talk to me every day. Daily practice with AI tutors works wonders. That's why fluently works. It's like a speaking partner in your pocket.
